title: centaurea attica subsp. pentelica
intro: Centaurea attica subsp. pentelica, also known as Pentelicum Knapweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Greece. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help in treating various health issues such as wounds, infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Centaurea attica subsp. pentelica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. It can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications and allergies.
